Title: Ruby Gillman: Teenage Kraken
Writer: Pam Brady, Brian C. Brown, Elliott DiGuiseppi
Actors: Jane Fonda, Lana Condor, Toni Collette
Plot: A shy 16-year-old girl learns that she comes from a fabled royal family of legendary sea krakens and that her destiny lies in the depths of the waters, which is bigger than she could have ever imagined.
